title: Many string operations cause compile time hang

features.name: chained string concatenation in function
features.description: Code should include a function with repeated string concatenation assignments using the {} operator where each concatenation appends to a variable assigned within the same function

features.name: function return assigned via function name
features.description: Code should include a function where the return value is assigned by assigning to the function name itself within a begin/end block

features.name: nested string function calls for incremental building
features.description: Code should include a string building function that calls another helper function to continue building the string result
